_DEMONSTRATION_DATA: Synthetic AR collection outcomes, for demonstrating the self-improvement loop only. NOT real dLocal or company data. Each row is a closed period: what the 13-week forecast assumed was collectible vs what was actually collected. The realized rate here is a clean 0.92, so the deterministic calibrator proposes ar_collection_rate 0.90 -> 0.92 (within the 0.03 step and the [0.80, 0.98] bounds).
